titles.title: What He's Done for Me Is So Amazing

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What He's done for me is so amazing. The love He has for me I cannot explain. All I know is I once was lost but now I'm found. I was blind but now I see And I know He will do for you, What He's done for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What he's done for me is so amazing (Yeah yeah eh), The love he has for me I cannot explain (Oh), All I know is I once was lost but now I'm found. I was blind but now I see And I know He will do for you, What He's done for me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Amazing love (Love so amazing), Amazing love (So incredible), Amazing love (The love of my savior), Amazing love.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All I know is I once was lost but now I'm found. I was blind but now I see And I know He will do for you What He's done for me. Amazing love (So incredible), Amazing love (So amazing), Amazing love (The love of my savior), Amazing love.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All I know is I once was lost but now I'm found. I was blind but now I see

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And I know He will do for you What He's done for me. (For me) And I know He will do for you What He's done for me. And I know He will do for you What He's done for me.
